rows.description: Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for header type and description. No amounts visible. Visually confirmed as a centered heading.

rows.description: allowed M^r Powell Expenses of y^e Prop^y 1760

rows.description: allowed Ditto Expenses in London ab^t y^e Merton Inclosure

rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Mr Powell for expenses in London relating to the Merton inclosure, amounting to £7 7s 0d.

rows.description: allowed him y^e fee given by him to S^r Blackstone

rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for the total line, amounts, and fraction. Clearly visible in the image below a horizontal rule.

rows.description: Gave S^t Mich: Parish a Voluntary Contribution towards repairing their Church.
rows.notes: This is a single logical entry whose description spans two lines, with the amount on the second line. The description was combined from gemini-flash (R21 and R22) as it accurately captures 'S^t Mich:' and 'repairing'. Amounts (5£ 5s 0d) are in consensus and clearly visible. gpt-5-mini combined the description and amount into a single row, which is the correct structure, but its transcription of the description was slightly less accurate.
rows.english_description: Voluntary contribution to St Michael’s parish towards repairing their church.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Voluntary contribution to St Michael’s parish towards repairing their church, amounting to £5 5s 0d.
